channel.title: Research on diego
channel.description: Recent content in Research on diego

item.title: Quantopian's Paper Reviews 05/5-9
item.description:
This is a weekly review of Quant Radio’s research paper review for the week of May 5-9. ‘Quant Radio’ is a podcast from Quantopian where they review interesting papers on algorithmic trading. None of this is written by ChatGPT, so I apologize if there are any mistakes/errors.

I will just go over the papers that I deem interesting and maybe do some testing proposed on the papers.

Artificial Intelligence in Finance

This is a report from the Turing Institute on how that review literature on how artificial intelligence, machine learning and deep learning applied in the financial service industry.
